title: AI Meta Ad Creative Designer
brief: AI & Meta Ad Creative Designer I’m looking for a US-based creative designer to take over weekly ad creative production for my e-commerce brand. You’ll be using AI tools (ChatGPT, Midjourney, or similar) to produce high-quality static and motion ads for Meta campaigns. About the role: This is a fixed-price weekly retainer at $300/week for approximately two full days of work. I need someone reliable who can hit a consistent weekly turnaround and understands creative production for the hemp/supplement space. Weekly workflow: • Monday: I’ll send you the top-performing ads from the previous week so you can see what’s working and what direction to lean into. • Monday–Tuesday: You produce the new creatives and submit them for review. • Tuesday by 12 PM PST: Any revisions or fixes are due, so creatives are ready to post Wednesday morning. What you’ll deliver: • 40 creatives per week total • 80% static ads, 20% motion ads • Creatives optimized for Meta ad performance Who I’m looking for: • US-based (required) • Experience designing ad creatives for e-commerce, ideally in hemp, supplements, or other regulated/gray-market categories • Comfortable using AI tools to generate and refine visuals efficiently • Reliable, communicative, and able to consistently meet the Monday–Tuesday cycle • Understands Meta’s creative guidelines and how to position product imagery to avoid compliance flags If you’ve worked with hemp or similar brands and can move fast without sacrificing quality, this is a s
